# AppleTechStore - Pakistan's Leading Mobile Phone & Electronics Store

## About AppleTechStore
AppleTechStore is a premier online and physical retail store based in Bahria Phase 7, Rawalpindi, Pakistan. We specialize in selling mobile phones, laptops, spare parts, and providing professional repair services.

## Website
- Main Website: https://appletechstore.pk
- Shop: https://appletechstore.pk/shop
- Spare Parts: https://appletechstore.pk/spare-parts
- Used Phones: https://appletechstore.pk/phones
- Laptops: https://appletechstore.pk/laptops
- Accessories: https://appletechstore.pk/accessories
- Book Repair: https://appletechstore.pk/book-repair

## Location
Bahria Phase 7, Rawalpindi, Punjab, Pakistan

## Business Hours
Monday - Sunday: 10:00 AM - 10:00 PM

## Products We Sell

### Mobile Phones (New & Used)
- Apple iPhone (all models including iPhone 16 Pro Max, iPhone 15, iPhone 14, etc.)
- Samsung Galaxy (S series, A series, Z Fold, Z Flip)
- OnePlus (OnePlus 13, Nord CE series)
- Xiaomi (Mi series, Redmi series)
- Huawei (Pura series, Mate series)
- Oppo (Reno series, Find series)
- Vivo (X series, V series)
- Google Pixel

### Mobile Spare Parts
- LCD/AMOLED/OLED Screens
- Batteries
- Charging Ports & Flex Cables
- Back Glass Panels
- Camera Lenses
- Speakers & Earpieces
- Power Button Flex
- SIM Trays
- Mainboards/Logic Boards

### Laptops & Computers
- Laptops from major brands
- Laptop accessories
- Computer spare parts

### Mobile Accessories
- Phone Cases & Covers
- Screen Protectors
- Chargers & Cables
- Power Banks
- Wireless Earbuds
- Smartwatches

## Services

### Phone Repair Services
- Screen Replacement (LCD, AMOLED, OLED)
- Battery Replacement
- Charging Port Repair
- Water Damage Repair
- Software Troubleshooting
- Camera Repair
- Speaker/Microphone Repair

All repairs come with warranty.

## Payment Methods Accepted
- Cash on Delivery (COD)
- JazzCash
- Easypaisa
- Bank Transfer

## Shipping & Delivery
- Free delivery in Bahria Phase 7 area
- Nationwide delivery across Pakistan via TCS and other couriers

## Why Choose AppleTechStore?
1. Wholesale prices on all products
2. Genuine and quality-tested products
3. Professional repair services with warranty
4. Multiple payment options
5. Fast and reliable delivery
6. Expert customer support
7. Wide range of brands and models

## Currency
All prices are in Pakistani Rupees (PKR)

## Target Audience
- Individual customers looking for mobile phones
- Retailers and resellers (wholesale pricing available)
- Repair shops looking for spare parts
- People needing phone repair services

## Contact
Visit our website: https://appletechstore.pk
Location: Bahria Phase 7, Rawalpindi, Pakistan
